Project details

What is Black Panther?

  • Black Panther is the leading AI driven asset management protocol building on Injective.
  • It builds intelligent vaults that use automated trading strategies to help its users achieve superior returns.
  • It is also developing several synergistic DeFi products such as: Liquid Staking Derivatives, Real World Assets, Lending, Liquidation and Portfolio Management.

Key features and highlights:

  • Since launching on Injective mainnet a few months ago, Black Panther has achieved significant market traction. Its vaults have exceeded $100M in trading volume and it has over 50,000 active users in its community. It is also currently overseeing 36 vault strategies such as hyper staking, grid trading, trend following and market making.
  • It empowers traders by creating DeFi primitives to support thousands of trading strategies. Examples include its tokenized vault factory, which enables traders to easily spin up a vault to execute trading strategies for their depositors.
  • Black Panther will also be building money markets, AMMs, Liquid Staking derivatives and structured products and many other DeFi products that allow portfolio managers and traders to develop profitable trading strategies.
  • The goal is to become an asset management hub, providing the financial infrastructure and connecting portfolio managers with investors.

Tokenomics:

Black Panther charges a 2% management fee p.a. and a 1% withdrawal fee on its vaults. This fee will be treated as protocol revenue and it will be distributed to BLACK token holders, providing real revenue and utility to its protocol token. Learn more here

*After subscription ends, subscribers will receive the full allocation of BLACK tokens. No Mito vault will be automatically created.

Stake requirement for subscription

The amount each address can subscribe is based on the amount of INJ staked.

Staked INJMax subscription amount
1 INJ or more
1000 INJ

How it works

Mito Launchpad allows users to obtain BLACK, tokens before it is listed.

When the launchpad opens, users can subscribe into the BLACK pool using INJ. The launchpad will lock up the INJ you used to subscribe to the sale until the sale closes. If the project hits their minimum raise target, then the sale completes and moves onto the next phase. Conversely, if the target is not met, then all users who participated can claim back their INJ.

To learn more about the Launchpad, visit the Mito Blog.
